title: 我是谁
prompt_en: Practice introducing yourself with I am. Say your name age nationality.
prompt_zh: 练习用I am自我介绍：姓名、年龄、国籍、身份。
description: 掌握I am+名字/年龄/国籍/身份的基本句型，以及否定句I am not。
knowledge_points: be动词 自我介绍 I am 否定句
teaching_markdown:
## 开口顺序

先说 Hello/Hi，再说 I am+名字。
- I am a student.
- I am from China.
- I am 20 years old.

注意：不能说 I student，必须有 am。

title: 你是谁
prompt_en: Practice asking and answering with You are/Are you?.
prompt_zh: 练习用You are/Are you?询问和回答对方身份和状态。
description: 掌握You are+描述/Are you?疑问句，以及How are you?问候。
knowledge_points: You are Are you How are you
teaching_markdown:
## 问候三步

1. Hello/Hi
2. How are you? → I'm fine thanks.
3. Are you a student? → Yes I am./No I'm not.

You后总是用are，不论单数复数。

title: 我的信息
prompt_en: Learn to share personal info: name nationality age job.
prompt_zh: 练习说出自己的基本信息：姓名、国籍、年龄、职业。
description: 综合运用I am/My name is/I'm from/I'm+年龄说出完整自我介绍。
knowledge_points: 综合输出 个人信息
teaching_markdown:
## 完整模板

Hi! I'm+名字. I'm from+国家. I'm+年龄 years old. I'm a+职业. Nice to meet you!

am不能漏，years要加s。

title: 问候与礼貌
prompt_en: Master greetings and polite expressions: hello hi nice to meet you please thank you.
prompt_zh: 掌握问候语和礼貌用语：hello/hi/nice to meet you/please/thank you。
description: 掌握日常问候和基本礼貌用语。
knowledge_points: 问候 礼貌 感谢
teaching_markdown:
## 见面三步

1. Hi!/Hello!
2. Nice to meet you.
3. Nice to meet you too.

感谢：Thank you.→You're welcome.
礼貌请求：Please sit down./Can you help me please?

title: 年龄与数字
prompt_en: Learn numbers 1-20 and saying your age.
prompt_zh: 学习数字1到20和表达年龄。
description: 掌握数字1-20和年龄表达：I am+数字+years old。
teaching_markdown:
## 数字1-10

one two three four five six seven eight nine ten

## 年龄表达

How old are you?→I am 20 (years old).

1 year不加s，2及以上加s：2 years old。

title: 它是什么
prompt_en: Learn to describe things with It is+noun/adj.
prompt_zh: 练习用It is+名词/形容词描述事物。
description: 掌握It is+名词/形容词描述事物，以及What is this?问句。
teaching_markdown:
## 描述格式

What is this?→It is a book.
加颜色：It is red.
加大小：It is very big.

It is=It's。a/an不能省。

title: 颜色与大小
prompt_en: Learn colors and sizes: red blue big small long short.
prompt_zh: 学习颜色词和大小词。
description: 掌握基本颜色和大小的形容词，描述物品外观。
knowledge_points: 颜色 大小 形容词
teaching_markdown:
## 颜色

red blue green yellow black white

## 大小

big small long short

顺序：大小+颜色+名词：a big red bag。

title: 位置与方向
prompt_en: Learn location words: here there on in under next to.
prompt_zh: 学习位置词：这里、那里、在上面、在里面、在下面、在旁边。
description: 掌握基本位置介词和There/Where问答。
teaching_markdown:
## 位置词

here/there/on/in/under/next to

## 问答

Where is the book?→It is on the table.
Where are you?→I'm here.

英语位置必须加介词。

title: 天气描述
prompt_en: Learn to describe weather: hot cold sunny rainy warm.
prompt_zh: 学习描述天气：热、冷、晴、雨、暖。
description: 掌握基本天气词，用It is+天气词描述天气。
teaching_markdown:
## 天气表达

How is the weather?→It is sunny.
It is hot today./It is very cold.

天气词：sunny rainy cloudy windy hot cold warm

It is+天气词比The weather is更自然。

title: 数量表达
prompt_en: Learn to express quantity: one two many few a lot of.
prompt_zh: 学习数量表达：一、二、很多、一些、少量。
description: 掌握基本数量词和There be句型。
teaching_markdown:
## There be

There is a book./There are two pens.
There are many students.

There is+单数，There are+复数。

title: 他/她是谁
prompt_en: Learn to introduce others: He is/She is+name job nationality.
prompt_zh: 学习介绍他人：他/她是+名字/职业/国籍。
description: 掌握He/She is+身份描述，以及His/Her物主代词。
teaching_markdown:
## 介绍他人

He is my friend./She is a teacher.
His name is Tom./Her name is Mary.

he=他(男)，she=她(女)，his=他的，her=她的。

title: 家庭关系
prompt_en: Learn family members: father mother brother sister son daughter.
prompt_zh: 学习家庭关系：爸爸、妈妈、哥哥、姐姐、儿子、女儿。
description: 掌握基本家庭称谓，用He/She is my...描述家人。
teaching_markdown:
## 家庭成员

father/dad 爸爸 / mother/mom 妈妈
brother 兄弟 / sister 姐妹

介绍：He is my father./She is my mother.
brother/sister不分大小，需加older/younger区分。

title: 职业身份
prompt_en: Learn jobs: teacher doctor student worker nurse.
prompt_zh: 学习职业身份：老师、医生、学生、工人、护士等。
description: 掌握常见职业词，用He/She is a+职业描述他人。
teaching_markdown:
## 常见职业

teacher/doctor/student/nurse/worker/driver

描述：He is a doctor./She is a teacher.

职业前要加a/an：He is doctor ❌→He is a doctor ✅

title: 外表描述
prompt_en: Learn to describe appearance: tall short thin young old pretty.
prompt_zh: 学习描述外表：高矮胖瘦、年轻年老、漂亮。
description: 掌握基本外表形容词，用He/She is+外表词描述。
teaching_markdown:
## 外表词

tall 高/short 矮/thin 瘦/young 年轻/old 老/pretty 漂亮

He is tall and thin./She is very pretty.

形容人时He is tall描述身高。

title: 国籍与语言
prompt_en: Learn countries and languages: China Chinese Japan Japanese America English.
prompt_zh: 学习国家和语言：中国/中文、日本/日语、美国/英语。
description: 掌握常见国家和语言词，用from+国家/speak+语言描述。
teaching_markdown:
## 国家与语言

China/Chinese 中国/中文
Japan/Japanese 日本/日语
America/English 美国/英语

I am from China. I speak Chinese.

Chinese前不加a：I am Chinese.✅

title: 打招呼与告别
prompt_en: Master greetings and farewells: hi hello goodbye see you.
prompt_zh: 掌握打招呼和告别用语：Hi/Hello/Goodbye/See you。
description: 掌握日常打招呼和告别的基本表达方式。
knowledge_points: 寒暄 打招呼 告别
teaching_markdown:
## 打招呼

Hi!/Hello!（任何时候）
Good morning/afternoon/evening!

## 告别

Goodbye!/Bye!/See you later!/Good night!

Good night是告别语不是打招呼。晚上见面说Good evening。

title: 简单闲聊
prompt_en: Practice small talk: How are you? Where are you from? What do you do?
prompt_zh: 练习简单闲聊：你好吗？你来自哪里？你是做什么的？
description: 掌握How/What/Where引导的简单闲聊问句和回答。
teaching_markdown:
## 闲聊三步

1. How are you?→I'm fine.
2. Where are you from?→I'm from China.
3. What do you do?→I'm a student.

回应时加 And you? 反问对方。

title: 询问近况
prompt_en: Learn to ask about recent situations: How is your day? What's new?
prompt_zh: 学习询问近况：今天过得怎么样？有什么新鲜事？
description: 掌握询问对方近况的表达和回应方式。
teaching_markdown:
## 问近况

How is your day?→It's good./Not bad.
What's new?→Nothing much.
How are things?→Everything is fine.

好：Pretty good!/Great!/Not bad!
一般：So-so.
不好：Not very good.

title: 介绍他人
prompt_en: Learn to introduce people: This is... Let me introduce... Have you met...?
prompt_zh: 学习互相介绍：这是.../让我介绍一下.../你见过...吗？
description: 掌握互相介绍的社交用语。
teaching_markdown:
## 互相介绍

This is my friend Tom.
Let me introduce my classmate Mary.
Tom this is Mary. Mary this is Tom.

回应：Nice to meet you./I've heard a lot about you.

title: 表达关心
prompt_en: Learn to express concern: Are you okay? Take care. Get well soon.
prompt_zh: 学习表达关心：你还好吗？保重。早日康复。
description: 掌握表达关心和问候健康的基本用语。
teaching_markdown:
## 关心表达

Are you okay?→Yes I'm fine./No I'm a little tired.
What's wrong?→I have a headache.
Take care!/Get well soon.

回应：Thank you for asking./I'm fine don't worry.

title: 数字1-20
prompt_en: Learn numbers 1-20: one two three...twenty.
prompt_zh: 学习数字1-20的读写和发音。
description: 掌握基数词1-20的读法和写法，能说年龄和数量。
teaching_markdown:
## 1-10

one two three four five six seven eight nine ten

## 11-20

eleven twelve thirteen fourteen fifteen sixteen seventeen eighteen nineteen twenty

13 thirteen ≠ 30 thirty，注意teen与ty的区别。

title: 时间表达
prompt_en: Learn to tell time: What time is it? It's 3 o'clock. half past quarter to.
prompt_zh: 学习表达时间：几点了？3点、3点半、3点一刻、差一刻4点。
description: 掌握基本时间表达，能问时间和说时间。
teaching_markdown:
## 问时间

What time is it?

## 整点

It's 3 o'clock.

## 半点与刻

3:30→half past three/three thirty
3:15→quarter past three/three fifteen
3:45→quarter to four/three forty-five

口语中直接用数字更常见：three fifteen。

title: 日期与星期
prompt_en: Learn days and dates: Monday Tuesday... January... 1st 2nd 3rd.
prompt_zh: 学习星期和日期表达：周一、周二...、一月、二月...、1号、2号。
description: 掌握星期一到星期日、月份、序数词基本表达。
knowledge_points: 星期 日期 月份
teaching_markdown:
## 星期

Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday

## 月份

January February March April May June July August September October November December

## 日期

What's the date today?→It's July 1st.

星期首字母大写。on Monday，in July。
ink_script_key: practice_foundation-beginner_基础①_数字与时间_日期与星期

title: 日常时间词
prompt_en: Learn time words: today tomorrow yesterday morning afternoon evening night.
prompt_zh: 学习日常时间词：今天、明天、昨天、早上、下午、晚上、夜里。
description: 掌握基本时间名词，用时间词描述日常安排。
teaching_markdown:
## 时间词

today/tomorrow/yesterday
morning/afternoon/evening/night

## 搭配

this morning/this afternoon
tomorrow morning/yesterday evening
at night/in the morning

in the morning/afternoon/evening，但 at night。
ink_script_key: practice_foundation-beginner_基础①_数字与时间_日常时间词

title: 频率表达
prompt_en: Learn frequency words: always usually often sometimes never every day.
prompt_zh: 学习频率词：总是、通常、经常、有时、从不、每天。
description: 掌握基本频率副词，能描述习惯的频率。
teaching_markdown:
## 频率词

always 总是/usually 通常/often 经常/sometimes 有时/never 从不/every day 每天

## 位置

I always eat breakfast.
频率词在动词前，be动词后：I am always happy。

title: 我想要...
prompt_en: Learn to express wants: I want... I would like... I need...
prompt_zh: 学习表达想要的：我想要...、我想（礼貌）...、我需要...。
description: 掌握want/would like/need表达需求和愿望。
teaching_markdown:
## 表达需求

I want+名词：I want a coffee.
I want to+动词：I want to go.
I would like（更礼貌）：I'd like some water.
I need：I need help.

want to go,不是want go（to不能省）。

title: 我能/我会
prompt_en: Learn to express ability: I can... Can you...?
prompt_zh: 学习表达能力：我会...、我能...、你能...吗？
description: 掌握can表达能力、请求和许可。
teaching_markdown:
## Can的用法

能力：I can speak English.
请求：Can you help me?
许可：Can I go now?

回答：Yes I can./No I can't.

can后动词原形，不加to：I can swim ✅

title: 我喜欢/不喜欢
prompt_en: Learn to express likes and dislikes: I like... I don't like... I love...
prompt_zh: 学习表达喜好：我喜欢...、我不喜欢...、我热爱...。
description: 掌握like/don't like/love表达喜好。
teaching_markdown:
## 喜好表达

I like+名词：I like coffee.
I like+to do/doing：I like to read./I like reading.
I love+名词/doing：I love music.
I don't like...：I don't like cold weather.

程度：like < love < really love

title: 身体感受
prompt_en: Learn to express physical feelings: hungry thirsty tired cold hot sleepy.
prompt_zh: 学习表达身体感受：饿了、渴了、累了、冷了、热了、困了。
description: 掌握基本身体感受词，用I am+感受词表达状态。
teaching_markdown:
## 感受词

I am hungry./I am thirsty./I am tired.
I am cold./I am hot./I am sleepy.

## 需求搭配

I am hungry.→I want to eat.
I am thirsty.→Can I have some water?

I am hungry不是 I have hungry（中文干扰）。

title: 请求帮助
prompt_en: Learn to ask for help: Can you help me? I need help. Could you please...?
prompt_zh: 学习请求帮助：你能帮我吗？我需要帮助。你能...吗？
description: 掌握基本求助表达，能在需要时开口求助。
teaching_markdown:
## 求助表达

Can you help me?
I need help.
Could you please...?（更礼貌）

## 具体请求

Can you help me find...?
Could you please repeat that?

Could比Can更礼貌，对陌生人优先用Could。
